title: Weather2 Addition
description: just a addon for weather2 mod, that adds a command for summon storms, on selected position, aimed to another selected position and them can grow to selected stage
body:
its just adds a one command "weatheraddition" that can summon growable storm on selected position and moving to second selected position.
example: "weatheraddition summon_grow storm_lightning tornado_f5 ~800 ~ ~ ~ ~ ~"
args: weatheraddition summon_grow (start) (max) (position) (target)
